message:
🐛 Fix security hooks stuck loading + add Event Activity filters (#452)

- Fix security hooks stuck in loading state in demo mode by initializing
  with demo data and moving demo check to start of refetch function
- Add cluster, reason, and event type filters to Event Activity chart
- Extract unique clusters from events for activity filter dropdown

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
